title: Square Root Project
description: A PvP resource pack useful as "base" for other texture packs
body:
Hello! This texture pack just aims to be a "Base" for other texture pack overlays which do not include blocks, GUIs and other items. Keeping my pixel art style and trying to follow a "Vanilla" styled thingy... hope you like it!

 

If any item is missing, please report with a comment!
![Blocks](https://imgur.com/yhEdDqp.gif)
![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f5d23c1acc807bbe80d3e28ebff289369edf414.png)



Version 8.0! New sky!
![Sky](https://i.imgur.com/nF6Vfw9.png)
